深夜、長引いた仕事も終わろうとしていた頃。<br>最後の書類の内容が目に入った。:
Late at night, just as the long workday was finally winding down, the
contents of the last document caught my eye.
いつもお姉さんぶるフィルムに心配はいらないと思いつつ、<br>心のどこかで彼女の:
I told myself not to worry about Film, who always acted like a big
sister, but deep down, I was still concerned about her.
フィルムを呪っている幽霊、ノワールが突然に姿を見せた。<br>彼女を離れ、１人で:
Noir, the ghost who cursed Film, suddenly appeared. It was rare for
her to appear alone, without Film.
強い意思のこもった視線に、自然と瞳が吸い寄せられる。<br>ノワールの力なのだろ:
My eyes were naturally drawn to her gaze, so full of intent. It must
have been Noir's power—a clear image was projected into my mind.
……わたし、これからお客さんと、<br>えっちなことをするのね。: I'm... about to do something lewd with a customer now.
娼館のお仕事は大切だって分かっているけど……。<br>せめて初めての人は、好意を:
I know the job at the brothel is important, but... I wish my first time
could have been with someone who liked me.
ノワールだけにこぼした、フィルムの本当の気持ち。<br>それをはっきりと見せられ:
Film's true feelings—the ones she had revealed only to Noir—were now
shown to me clearly.
フィルムの気持ちを知った上で、<br>放っておくことはできなかった。: Knowing how Film truly felt, I couldn't just leave it alone.
（大丈夫、フィルムお姉さんなら平気よ。<br>このぐらいで悲しむほど、人生経験は:
(It's okay, Big Sister Film is fine. I've had enough life experience not
to get sad over something like this.)
姿を見せた人物に、フィルムが驚きをあらわにする。: Film was visibly surprised by the person who appeared.
し、司令官くんっ！？<br>どうしたの？ 様子を見に来たの？: C-Commander! What's wrong? Did you come to check on me?
困惑する彼女に、自分が客であることを告げた。: She was bewildered, so I told her I was the customer.
そんな……嘘……。<br>司令官くんが、わたしを……？: That's... no way... Commander, you're here for me...?
（初めての人が、司令官くんなら……すごく、嬉しい……！<br>だけど、本当にわた:
(If my first time is with Commander... I'm so happy...! But... are you
sure you want me...?)
でも、わたしみたいなお婆ちゃんが、<br>司令官くんのお相手だなんて……: But an old lady like me being your partner, Commander...
戸惑うフィルムへと歩み寄る。<br>こちらは客なのだから、相手をしてもらわなけれ:
I approached the flustered Film. As a customer, I had to insist she
attend to me.
